title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 09 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 09 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 09 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/06/2025
Today, the DCE Iron Ore futures market opened with a strong upward trend but pulled back in the afternoon, after a doldrums session the day before yesterday.The most-traded contract I2509 eventually closed at 703, down 0.71% for the day. Traders sold goods in line with market conditions, while steel mills remained cautious and adopted a wait-and-see aƫtude, focusing on purchasing as needed. The market trading atmosphere was average.
